name: @hojai/whatsapp
description: WhatsApp SDK - Client for the HOJAI WhatsApp OS (port 4860). 360dialog / Twilio / Meta Cloud API provider switching, template management, contact CRM, and messaging.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc src/__tests__/index.test.ts --target ES2022 --module ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --declaration --outDir dist

author: HOJAI AI
